# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service:80
    port: 80
    path: /user

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service:80
    port: 80
    path: /product

routes:
  - name: user-route
    protocols: [http, https]
    paths:
      - /user/*
    service: user-service
    upstream:
      target: user-service:80
      hash_fallback: true
      loadbalancer:
        algorithm: round-robin

  - name: product-route
    protocols: [http, https]
    paths:
      - /product/*
    service: product-service
    upstream:
      target: product-service:80
      hash_fallback: true
      loadbalancer:
        algorithm: round-robin

consumers:
  - username: admin
    keyauth-credentials:
      key: secret-key

plugins:
  - name: kong-no-auth
    enabled: false

routes:
  - name: no-auth-route
    protocols: [http, https]
    paths:
      - /no-auth/*
    service: user-service
